name: Ox Tail Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 White turnips or 1/2 head of Cabbage
1 can (10 1/2 oz) condensed beef broth or 4 bouillon cubes in 2 cups water
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 6-quart kettle, slowly brown the ox tails in butter for about 30 minutes.
2. Add 3 quarts of water and bring to a boil. Skim foam from the surface several times.
3. Add salt, onions, parsley sprigs, thyme, peppercorns, and bay leaf. Bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered for 3 hours.
5. Remove ox tails and cut meat off bones.
6. Cut carrots and turnips (or cabbage) into strips about 2 inches long. Cut celery into 2-inch pieces and in half lengthwise.
7. Add the meat, carrots, turnips, and celery back to the pot. Bring to a boil.
8. Simmer until vegetables are done (tender-crisp for about 5 minutes).
9. Add sherry; simmer an additional 5 minutes.
10. Garnish with parsley.
